ogTitle: Merriang South vs Merricks Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Merriang South and Merricks Beach.
heading: Merriang South vs Merricks Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Merriang South, Victoria and Merricks Beach, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Merricks Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Merriang South (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Merriang South or Merricks Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Merriang South has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Merricks Beach scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Merriang South scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Merricks Beach scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Merriang South or Merricks Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Merricks Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
